mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - Where You Always Get What You Think You Deserve!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I walked into a coffee shop, ready to conquer the day. As I placed my order, the barista dared to ask if I wanted my coffee hot. Hot?! Of course, I want it hot; I'm Hot Josh! But then, to my horror, my order arrives lukewarm. Lukewarm, can you believe it?! I stormed up to the counter, demanded to speak to the manager, and made sure that barista learned the consequences of questioning the temperature preferences of someone as hot as me. After a dramatic monologue on the importance of respecting customers' desires, I left that coffee shop with a steaming cup of perfectly hot coffee, feeling completely justified in my entitled outrage. Because when Hot Josh speaks, the world better listen!
